domain_name.description: The domain name to use for sending emails. Null means default.

from_name.description: The name to display in the 'From' field of emails.

from_email.description: The email address to use in the 'From' field.

reply_to_email.description: The email address to use in the 'Reply-To' field. If set to null, 'Reply-To' header is omitted.
